title: andropogon contortus var. glaber
intro: Andropogon contortus var. glaber, also known as the smooth bluestem grass, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Andropogon contortus var. glaber include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in digestion and relieve urinary tract problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically prepared by steeping the dried leaves and stems in hot water to release their medicinal compounds.
